Dashboard Archive: 2026-05-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers at the top of the momentum rankings. APA claims the #1 position with a composite score of 95.7, driven by extraordinary long-term returns (132.58% over 1 year) and perfect technical positioning (all SMA gates passed). WTTR follows closely with similar 1-year returns (134.94%) and even stronger intermediate momentum, posting a 33.24% monthly return versus APA's 13.73%. Both stocks exhibit clean momentum signals with excellent ratio consistency across timeframes (4 out of 5 ratio passes each) and demonstrate resilience during market downturns, evidenced by their high bad_spy_scores (2.76 and 1.56 respectively). The key differentiator is APA's superior return consistency and ratio structure, which slightly edges out WTTR's more volatile but sharper recent performance. Both tickers are heavily correlated with energy sector dynamics (XLE at 0.856 for APA), suggesting their momentum is tied to commodity tailwinds rather than broad market strength.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
